name: Platinum
effective_cost: Free, with no annual fee, but earns nothing

verdict.text: Not a rewards card: just a stepping stone to Quicksilver

earn_note: Capital One Platinum never earned cash back or points; it's built entirely around credit access (approvals for fair/average credit) and an automatic credit-line review, not rewards. If you want cash back on a Capital One credit-building card, use QuicksilverOne (1.5%, $39/yr) instead.

points.note: This card has no points or cash-back program of any kind. Its entire value proposition is credit access: reporting to all three credit bureaus and an automatic review for a higher credit line after 6 months of on-time payments.

transfer_partners.highlight: No rewards currency exists on this card, so there is nothing to transfer.

protection_note: Bare-bones by design, more so than Capital One's own Quicksilver family. Capital One's official Platinum materials don't advertise purchase protection, extended warranty, price protection, or travel accident insurance the way the Quicksilver benefits pages do. Treat this card as carrying no meaningful purchase or travel protections rather than assuming standard Mastercard perks carry over; independent sources disagree on this point, so confirm your specific Guide to Benefits before relying on it.
rental_note: No rental car coverage is advertised for this card; use a different card for rentals.

services.name: No annual fee
services.detail: $0/year, with a variable 28.99% APR on purchases and cash advances and no introductory 0% period.

services.name: Automatic credit line review
services.detail: Capital One automatically considers cardholders for a higher credit line after 6 months of on-time payments, the core reason this card exists.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: $0 on purchases made outside the US.

services.name: Credit bureau reporting
services.detail: Reports payment activity to all three major credit bureaus, which is the entire point of holding this card.

services.name: Security & account tools
services.detail: $0 fraud liability for unauthorized charges, card lock in the app, virtual card numbers, and 24/7 Eno account monitoring.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Can help build the authorized user's credit history too
No rewards earned: this card has no rewards program to share

additional_cards.note: Free to add, but since Platinum itself earns nothing, the only upside for an authorized user is potential credit-history building, not rewards.
